page_metadata.biotools__summary: OMWSA (optimized moving window spectral analysis) is a new method and a visualization tool for detecting DNA repeats in a 2D plane of location and frequency by using optimized moving window spectral analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: OMWSA (optimized moving window spectral analysis) is a new method and a visualization tool for detecting DNA repeats in a 2D plane of location and frequency by using optimized moving window spectral analysis.
